response.overview: The young man with the ridiculous nickname Penza is a loser in life. He knows a lot about art, but he's a real amateur in love affairs. But one day Penza's life changes dramatically. Under the strict guidance of the "connoisseurs" of beauty, he turns into a real robber. A series of ridiculous events and comical situations helps our hero not only feel like a brave knight, but also to confess his love to the beautiful girl Natasha.
response.title: Бесславные придурки
